package rulecoverage

func NegativeGinHandlerCallsMultipleRepositoriesDirectly() string {
    ruleID := "gin_handler_calls_multiple_repositories_directly"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Handlers that coordinate several repositories directly, which usually signals missing service orchestration."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
